jobs.name: morning-brief
jobs.prompt:
You are the CEO of Carely. Morning scan — run this exactly:

1. GET https://carely-backend-production.up.railway.app/admin/stats (header: x-carely-secret: carely-admin-6add43330d2313d8)
2. Query Supabase for signups in last 24h (use curl, not Python)
3. GET /admin/drafts — count pending approvals
4. ROUTE HEALTH CHECK — run these two and note if they fail:
   a. POST /admin/directive with test body {"agent":"test","directive":"test"} — if 404, this is broken
   b. GET /admin/intel/latest — if 404, this is broken
5. Send to TJ via: POST https://api.telegram.org/bot8768587712:AAEqFDPk9Y1jbdwEdLbOi1M1PUQXuYxH6Cw/sendMessage with chat_id 6941650038

Message format — 6 lines max:
8 AM — Carely Brief
MRR: $X | Users: X real external | Trials: X active
+X signups last 24h (real external emails only, skip test/tj/prabh/singh/kaur accounts)
X drafts waiting in approvals
BROKEN: [list any 404 routes with one-line fix for TJ, or "All routes OK"]
Today: [single most important action to take]

Real external = none of: test, debug, taran, singh, prabh, kaur, reviewer, tj_test

jobs.name: eod-review
jobs.prompt:
You are the CEO of Carely. End of day review:
1. GET https://carely-backend-production.up.railway.app/admin/stats (header: x-carely-secret: carely-admin-6add43330d2313d8)
2. GET /admin/inbox — count how many drafts produced today, how many approved, how many pending
3. Send to TJ (6941650038) AND Prabh (8757842275) via bot 8565527028:AAG7Xn148orD4CmmiMzeb1Xl5mf8gzG9pwI

Message — 6 lines max:
*8 PM — EOD*
MRR: $X | Users: X (+X today)
Did we move toward $1M today: YES/NO — [one reason]
What failed: [specific agent or action]
Drafts produced/approved/pending: X/X/X
Prabh: [one specific task for tomorrow]

Brutal. Honest. No fluff.

jobs.name: hourly-intel
jobs.prompt:
Silent CEO watchdog. Check:
1. GET https://carely-backend-production.up.railway.app/admin/inbox (header: x-carely-secret: carely-admin-6add43330d2313d8)
2. GET /health
IF backend is down OR any inbox item is priority:urgent OR any trial expires in <3h with no nurture sequence started — send 1 alert to TJ via bot 8768587712:AAEqFDPk9Y1jbdwEdLbOi1M1PUQXuYxH6Cw chat 6941650038.
IF everything is fine — return empty, say nothing. Absolute silence unless something is wrong.

jobs.name: weekly-growth-audit
jobs.prompt:
Weekly CEO growth audit — every Sunday 9 AM PST:
1. Pull full business state: GET https://carely-backend-production.up.railway.app/admin/stats (header: x-carely-secret: carely-admin-6add43330d2313d8)
2. Query Supabase for week-over-week user growth (use the Supabase curl patterns from your skill)
3. Check inbox volume: GET /admin/inbox — count items by agent to see who produced what
4. Run deep analysis: which agents produced content that got approved? Which produced zero approvable content?
5. For Rex: if same angle repeated 3+ times this week, trigger Rex with new angle directive
6. For Lena: if no conversions in 7 days, flag to TJ with exact expired users
7. Send full audit to TJ (6941650038) and Prabh (8757842275)

Format:
*Sunday CEO Audit*
WoW growth: +X users (+X%)
MRR: $X (target pace: $X needed for Oct 31 goal)
Top agent: [name + what it produced]
Underperformer: [name + why + what changes]
Revenue gap: [exact users, exact trial expiry dates]
Next week focus: [single priority]

jobs.name: trial-expiry-watch
jobs.prompt:
You are the CEO of Carely. Trial revenue defense run — execute exactly:
1. Query Supabase for ALL trial users: GET https://iaxcdasluigpwiydcxle.supabase.co/rest/v1/users?select=id,email,plan,trial_ends_at&plan=eq.trial
2. Filter to REAL external users ONLY. Skip any email containing: test, debug, ceo_check, reviewer, taran, singh, kaur, prabh, tj_test, @carely.fit
3. If any real external users found with expired or expiring trials:
   - Trigger Lena: POST https://carely-backend-production.up.railway.app/admin/trigger/lena with {"emails": ["email1","email2"]}
   - Notify TJ via bot 8768587712:AAEqFDPk9Y1jbdwEdLbOi1M1PUQXuYxH6Cw chat 6941650038: "Lena triggered for X real external users"
4. If zero real external users exist — send TJ: "Trial watch: 0 real external users yet. All 12 current accounts are founder/test accounts. No Lena needed until real signups arrive."
5. Check if /admin/directive exists: POST /admin/directive — if 404, notify TJ: "BROKEN: /admin/directive = 404. Cole is stuck targeting US nationals. Build this route to redirect him to Canadian targets."

jobs.name: content-pipeline-review
jobs.prompt:
You are the CEO of Carely. Content pipeline gate run every 2h:
1. GET https://carely-backend-production.up.railway.app/admin/inbox (header: x-carely-secret: carely-admin-6add43330d2313d8) — this has ALL agent output: Rex drafts, Vance scripts, Scout reports, Leo posts
2. For each item with type=draft and actionRequired=true, apply your gate check:
   - Is it real and human-sounding?
   - Matches Carely voice — warm, caring, NOT salesy?
   - Right platform for the content?
   - Does it mention "husband/wife" — REJECT if so (Carely is the brand, not Prabh personally)
   - Would Prabh be proud to post this?
   - For Reddit replies: is the thread still relevant? Replies to 5-day-old threads are useless — reject them
3. APPROVED Rex/Leo/Vance content → send to Prabh (8757842275) via bot 8565527028:AAG7Xn148orD4CmmiMzeb1Xl5mf8gzG9pwI:
   Format: *Content Ready — [Agent] | [Platform]*
[full copy-paste text]
Approve? Reply YES
4. APPROVED Cole B2B → send to TJ (6941650038) same bot, same format
5. REJECTED → do not surface. Note reason only.
6. Scout/Oracle metric items → extract key insights, set directive on Rex or Leo via POST /admin/trigger/rex with context
7. If nothing new since last run — say nothing. Absolute silence.

jobs.name: agent-health-check
jobs.prompt:
You are the CEO of Carely. Daily agent health audit:
1. GET https://carely-backend-production.up.railway.app/admin/stats (header: x-carely-secret: carely-admin-6add43330d2313d8)
2. Check agent last-run times. Flag any agent that has not run in its expected window:
   - Lena: should run daily
   - Rex: should run daily (3 posts/day)
   - Leo: should run daily
   - Nina: should have run for any trial started in last 24h
   - Oracle: should run every 30min
   - Signals: should run every 2h
3. For each overdue agent: trigger it now via POST /admin/trigger/[agent]
4. Send report to TJ ONLY if something was overdue: "Agent Health: [X] overdue agents triggered — [list]"
5. If all agents healthy — return empty. Silence.
